description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric, featuring two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions. The sofa has a boxy, geometric silhouette with wide, straight armrests that are at the same height as the backrest. On one side, there is an integrated side table or armrest extension, which holds several small, colorful objects, possibly decorative items or toys. The sofa sits low to the ground, and its legs are not visible, suggesting a concealed or block-style base. Two decorative throw pillows with a pinkish pattern add a touch of color and comfort to the otherwise neutral palette.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with wide armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and pink patterned throw pillows. One side features an integrated side table holding small colorful items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the sofa, two large seat and back cushions, two pink patterned throw pillows, and the integrated side table with small items on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's boxy armrest and the depth of the seat cushions, with throw pillows visible against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sofa and the side table extension with colorful objects, with the overall rectangular shape and low profile evident.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the armrest and the side table extension, with a clear view of the throw pillows and the sofa's overall width.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, with two smaller decorative throw pillows placed symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at seat height, boxy profile, with the left armrest extended to form an integrated side table; no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a concealed or block-style base that is recessed or integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented, matching the seat cushions in width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish; throw pillows feature a pink geometric or plaid pattern for contrast.
